data.content: Implementation review complete. Approved. Commit 52001ba4 satisfies the dispatch-setup acceptance criteria: Settings now groups every bundled workflow target and offers Add to all, foolery setup mirrors the same grouped bundled targets and bulk-seed flow, runtime pool resolution is workflow/profile-aware with legacy fallback, and coverage verifies grouped target derivation plus UI and setup bulk-apply behavior. Sanity gates passed cleanly: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
